caption: A man wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie, tan suspenders, and a tall, stylized silver wig is seated in a room filled with framed photos and clothing. He wears black headphones and sits before a professional microphone. The background features a wall of pictures and clothing racks with "LEE" visible on a garment. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "THE TALK PODCAST" and another that says "GOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing as he looks slightly downward and then forward. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and head as he continues talking, with the lighting and background remaining consistent across the scene.
